raw_consumer_statement:
I disputed a charge with Barclays. 
They sent me a letter with rebuttal and said the charge was legitimate.But the order details were wrong, the expiration date is wrong, and the billing address is wrong too, the expiration dates were all wrong in the rebuttal, see pages in XXXX and XXXX, this proves I did not authorize the charge. I will attach evidence .Because the billing information was wrong : the charge should not go through. 
I emailed the merchant about my cancellation for my refund, they emailed me they can not find my account, I did not get the merchant 's services but they charge me money. 
On XX/XX/2024, I called the dispute person at Barclays, he said he reported the merchant for fraud, but now they gave me a letter saying my dispute was denied.
